title: Add norm parameter to ComplementNB
description:
sklearn ComplementNB has norm: bool = False. When True, applies a second L1 normalization step on the weights (per-class weights divided by their L1 norm) — the 'normalized weights' variant from Rennie et al. 2003 §4.4.

ferrolearn ComplementNB currently only implements the unnormalized variant. Add with_norm(bool) builder; apply second normalization in fit() when enabled. Reference: scikit-learn/sklearn/naive_bayes.py ComplementNB._update_feature_log_prob.
